name: Which Historical Era Matches Your Personality?
description: Discover which time period aligns with your values, temperament, and worldview

renaissance.title: The Renaissance Soul
renaissance.description: Like the 15th-16th century Renaissance, you thrive on intellectual curiosity, artistic expression, and interdisciplinary learning. You're a true polymath who sees connections between art, science, and philosophy.
renaissance.strengths: Creativity, intellectual breadth, appreciation for arts and sciences
renaissance.challenges: May struggle with specialization or focus

enlightenment.title: The Enlightenment Thinker
enlightenment.description: Like the 18th century Age of Reason, you value logic, progress, and human rights. Your approach to life is rational and principled, with faith in human potential through education and good governance.
enlightenment.strengths: Critical thinking, principled reasoning, advocacy, clarity
enlightenment.challenges: May underestimate emotional or irrational factors

romantic.title: The Romantic Spirit
romantic.description: Like the 19th century Romantic era, you lead with emotion, intuition, and appreciation for nature's sublime beauty. You value authentic self-expression and meaningful personal experiences.

modernist.title: The Modernist Innovator
modernist.description: Like the early 20th century Modernist movement, you embrace innovation, experimentation, and breaking with tradition. You're comfortable with ambiguity and enjoy challenging conventional thinking.
modernist.strengths: Innovation, adaptability, courage to challenge status quo
modernist.challenges: May alienate others or reject valuable traditions

questions.question: Your approach to life is most influenced by:
options: The pursuit of knowledge and beauty
Reason and universal principles
Emotional truth and nature
Innovation and new perspectives

questions.question: Which environment resonates most with your inner self?
options: A vibrant, art-filled city where creativity flourishes
A structured society driven by reason and progress
A peaceful countryside that evokes deep emotions
A futuristic metropolis with cutting-edge technology

questions.question: What drives your creative expression?
options: Exploring historical art and cultural masterpieces
Engaging in logical debates and scientific inquiry
Tapping into your deepest feelings and imagination
Embracing modern innovations and experimental ideas

questions.question: How do you view tradition and progress?
options: I cherish the legacy of the past and timeless art
I value progress through logic and scientific discovery
I embrace personal expression and emotional heritage
I prioritize breaking barriers with modern innovation

questions.question: What best describes your ideal social gathering?
options: A renaissance-style salon with art and culture discussions
An intellectual coffeehouse debate on philosophy and science
A heartfelt meetup celebrating music and nature
A modern forum for unconventional ideas and tech trends

questions.question: When facing challenges, which approach do you take?
options: Draw inspiration from historical wisdom and artistic beauty
Analyze the situation with logic and rational thought
Trust your intuition and let your emotions lead the way
Innovate with new strategies and forward-thinking ideas

questions.question: How do you define success?
options: Achieving mastery in the arts and connecting with heritage
Advancing through rational thought and scientific progress
Finding fulfillment through authentic emotional expression
Breaking boundaries and shaping a revolutionary future

questions.question: Which of these best captures your worldview?
options: A harmonious blend of classical art and timeless beauty
A society built on logic, order, and enlightenment
An era defined by raw emotion and expressive freedom
A future shaped by innovation and modern breakthroughs
